items.title: Web Development
items.text: Web development of websites or web applications, from analysis to maintenance through documentation. All while respecting the standards and specifications of software engineering.

items.title: Analysis, Audit & Advice
items.text: Assessment of technical needs and proposal of suitable solutions. Advice on software architecture, security and technological choices. Debugging and resolving technical issues.

items.title: Formation & Documentation
items.text: Training of internal teams, individuals or learners on new technologies and platforms. Writing of technical documentation (specifications, code documentation, etc.) and user guides.
